name: Greek Omelet Casserole

ingredients.item: Eight ounces of freshly cut spinach
One cup of crumbled feta cheese

method: Add the eggs into the bowl.
Beat the eggs for about five minutes.
Take another bowl and add the pepper, lemon pepper, fresh dill,
dried oregano, and salt into the bowl.
Add the olive oil and spinach into the egg bowl.
Mix the ingredients well and add the chopped garlic and the rest
Mix all the ingredients of both the bowls together.
Add the mixture to a greased baking dish.
Bake the casserole for twenty-five to thirty minutes.
Dish out the casserole when done.
The dish is ready to be served.
